evidence: Parameter 'q' reflects in response without encoding. alert(1) executed.
notes: Reflected XSS in search endpoint. No CSP present.

evidence: No CSRF token on state-changing POST endpoint.
notes: Admin delete action has no CSRF protection. SameSite not set.

evidence: Time-based blind SQLi confirmed: SLEEP(5) caused 5s delay.
notes: MySQL backend confirmed via error. FILE privilege unknown.

evidence: DB_PASSWORD, SECRET_KEY, and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY exposed in plain text.

evidence: Changing user ID in /api/users/{id}/profile returns other users' PII.
